emails.subject: Brazil
emails.body: Mark, Just ensuring you are in agreement with what I am seeing in Brazil: Andrea Bertone is legal counsel in Brazil who is working with you on EnronOnline. Pinherio Neto is outside legal counsel for EnronOnline in Brazil. Dave
